results.description: THIS ACQUISITION COVERS THE MANUFACTURE, OUTFITTING, AND DELIVERY OF ONE NEW 26 FOOT WELDED ALUMINUM PATROL BOAT WITH AT A MINIMUM TWO FOUR STOKE 200HP OUTBOARD ENGINES.

DUE TO WILDFIRE IN THE AREA OF THEIR BUSINESS ROGUE JET REQUESTS A DELIVERY DATE EXTENSION BECAUSE OF THE LOSS OF MAN HOURS FROM THE CURRENT WILDFIRES. DELIVERY DATE IS EXTENDED FROM 21 JANUARY 2021 TO 31 MARCH 2021.
